message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

rectangle "«page»\nmeetstars.html" as p_meetstars
rectangle "«controller»\nMeetStars" as c_meetstars
p_meetstars .. c_meetstars : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmeet_external_link_edit.html" as p_meet_external_link_edit
rectangle "«controller»\nMeetLinkEdit" as c_meetlinkedit
p_meet_external_link_edit .. c_meetlinkedit : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmeet_external_links_edit.html" as p_meet_external_links_edit
rectangle "«controller»\nMeetLinksEdit" as c_meetlinkseddit
p_meet_external_links_edit .. c_meetlinkseddit : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmeet_view.html" as p_meet_view
rectangle "«controller»\nMeetView" as c_meetview
p_meet_view .. c_meetview : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\ntalktomeetorganizer.html" as p_talktomeetorganizer
rectangle "«controller»\nTalkToMeetOrganizer" as c_talktomeetorganizer
p_talktomeetorganizer .. c_talktomeetorganizer : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\ntalktofriend.html" as p_talktofriend
rectangle "«controller»\nTalkToFriend" as c_talktofriend
p_talktofriend .. c_talktofriend : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmailbox_messages.html" as p_mailbox_messages
rectangle "«controller»\nConversation" as c_conversation
p_mailbox_messages .. c_conversation : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmailboxes.html" as p_mailboxes
rectangle "«controller»\nConversations" as c_conversations
p_mailboxes .. c_conversations : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nfriends.html" as p_friends
rectangle "«controller»\nFriends" as c_friends
p_friends .. c_friends : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nuser.html" as p_user
rectangle "«controller»\nFriendship" as c_friendship
p_user .. c_friendship : «controls»

rectangle "«page»\nmyaccount.html" as p_myaccount
rectangle "«controller»\nMyAccount" as c_myaccount
p_myaccount .. c_myaccount : «controls»
@enduml
